// Generated by `boundry diff` — one focused view per layer with a pending change.
// Derived artifact: regenerate after approve; do not hand-edit.
views {
  view boundry_diff_root {
    title 'Boundry diff · root'
    include *
    style element.tag = #proposed { color amber }
    style element.tag = #proposal-delete { color red }
    include * -> * where tag is #proposed with { color amber; line solid }
    include * -> * where tag is #proposal-delete with { color red; line solid }
  }
  view boundry_diff_billing of billing {
    title 'Boundry diff · billing'
    include *
    style element.tag = #proposed { color amber }
    style element.tag = #proposal-delete { color red }
    include * -> * where tag is #proposed with { color amber; line solid }
    include * -> * where tag is #proposal-delete with { color red; line solid }
  }
}
